title: hypodematium truncatum
intro: Hypodematium truncatum, also known as the truncate lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Hypodematiaceae. The truncate lip fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the truncate lip fern is typically used to make teas or infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
